input:
Staff Backend Engineer at Loom

Stack: Go, gRPC, PostgreSQL, Redis, GCP, Kubernetes.

What you'll do:
- Lead architectural decisions for our video processing pipeline
- Mentor a team of 4-5 backend engineers
- Drive technical roadmap for the platform team
- Partner with product on capacity planning
- Own end-to-end performance work

Required experience:
- 8+ years of backend engineering
- 3+ years working with Go in production
- Experience leading distributed teams
- Strong system design fundamentals
- Track record of mentoring senior engineers
- Comfort with gRPC service design
- Production PostgreSQL at significant scale

Nice to have:
- Video / streaming infrastructure background
- Experience with GCP specifically
- Open source maintainership

Comp: $190-240k base + equity. Remote within US/Canada/UK.
